meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any destructive or broad database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may later be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity or incomplete result context must remain outside confirmed histories.

primarySourcesChecked: HPA top page 2026 Numata Bench Press section
HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press A/B/C result速報 PDF
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: The batch found usable official rows, but database.json is the canonical roster/history file and should be updated only with a targeted schema-safe edit. This run avoids broad rewrite risk while PR #46 is open and while A-1 sex/category inconsistency remains unresolved.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Promote A-5 2026-04-25 PL history to data/database.json in a dedicated small PR; keep A-1 as candidate until category consistency is resolved.
